This Summer Solstice Festival Sun And Flower Crown coloring page gives kids a cute Summer Solstice Festival sun and flower crown, shown with sparkling or twinkling effects around it for a magical feel to color in, with bold lines and open spaces sized right for little hands. Print the free PDF at home and hand out crayons or colored pencils -- no prep needed. Beyond the fun, coloring builds Fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, pencil control, color recognition, seasonal vocabulary. Try teaching daylight, summer, festival while your child colors, and share this: People have celebrated the summer solstice for thousands of years, including ancient gatherings at Stonehenge in England.
